records.name: Ubiquiti airCube ISP AP
records.short_description: 2.4GHz, AirMax, 4xLAN, 802.11n 2x2, ** PSU adapter sold separately
records.searchText: ubiquiti aircube isp ap ubiquiti acb-isp acb-isp wifi routers wifi routers ubiquiti wired wifi cpe 2.4ghz, airmax, 4xlan, 802.11n 2x2, ** psu adapter sold separately the ubiquiti aircube isp ap is a compact and cost-effective wireless access point designed to deliver efficient and reliable wi-fi connectivity for internet service providers (isps) and their customers. part of ubiquiti networks' innovative lineup of networking products, the aircube isp is engineered to provide a seamless internet experience in a home or small office setting, combining performance with simplicity in a sleek, modern design. operating on the 2.4 ghz band, the aircube isp supports the 802.11n wi-fi standard, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of wireless devices while providing speeds of up to 300 mbps. this level of performance is suitable for everyday internet activities such as web browsing, email, and social media access, as well as streaming media content. its single-band operation is optimized to minimize interference in environments densely populated with wireless networks, making it an ideal solution for areas with a high concentration of wi-fi devices. one of the aircube isp's distinguishing features is its integrated four-port ethernet switch, which facilitates the direct connection of wired devices for enhanced performance and reliability. this capability allows users to easily connect desktop computers, gaming consoles, and other ethernet-enabled devices directly to the access point, ensuring stable and fast connections for activities that demand higher bandwidth or lower latency. the aircube isp is designed for effortless setup and deployment, making it accessible for users with limited technical knowledge. it can be powered through power over ethernet (poe) for a cleaner and more efficient installation, reducing the need for additional power cables and outlets. this feature also enables the aircube isp to be installed in locations where power outlets are scarce or inconveniently located, providing greater flexibility in positioning the device to optimize wi-fi coverage. management of the aircube isp is streamlined through the intuitive ubiquiti network management software (unms) app, available for both ios and android platforms. this application allows users to easily configure and monitor their network settings from a mobile device, offering features such as wi-fi network setup, device management, and performance analytics. the user-friendly interface ensures that maintaining and optimizing the home network is straightforward and hassle-free. security is a priority for the aircube isp, which includes advanced features to protect the network and connected devices from unauthorized access and cyber threats. it supports wpa2 encryption to secure wireless communications and comes equipped with firewall capabilities to manage and monitor access to the network. also, despite its compact size, the aircube isp does not compromise on design or build quality. its stylish, cube-shaped enclosure is not only aesthetically pleasing but also durable, making it a discreet yet powerful addition to any setting. ubiquiti aircube isp ap (acb-isp) is an ideal wireless solution for isps looking to offer their customers an affordable, reliable, and easy-to-manage wi-fi access point. with its straightforward setup, integrated ethernet switch, mobile management app, and robust security features, the aircube isp provides a solid foundation for a seamless and secure home networking experience, catering to the needs of modern internet users. ubiquiti wifi routers wired wifi cpe

records.name: Alfa USB Ethernet Adapter AUE2500CA
records.short_description: The Alfa AUE2500CA is a compact and high performance USB Ethernet adapter designed to deliver fast and reliable wired network connectivity through a modern USB Type C interface. Built for flexibility and everyday convenience, it supports multi gigabit speeds of up to 2.5 Gbps, making it an ideal solution for users who require faster network performance than standard Gigabit Ethernet can provide. The adapter features automatic speed negotiation, allowing it to seamlessly adapt to network conditions and select the optimal connection speed, whether 2.5 GbE, 1 GbE, or lower. This ensures compatibility with a wide range of network infrastructures, including Cat5e, Cat6, or higher grade cabling.

records.name: Ubiquiti Enterprise Access Hub

records.searchText: ubiquiti enterprise access hub ubiquiti eah-8 eah-8 access control access control hubs enterprise-grade access hub with entry and exit control to eight doors and battery backup support elevate your security measures and streamline access management with the ubiquiti enterprise access hub (eah-8), a powerful access control solution designed for enterprise-level applications. this robust hub seamlessly integrates with your existing access control infrastructure, providing centralized control over eight doors and offering a host of advanced features. its eight lock terminals support both 12v and dry contact locks, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of access control systems. additionally, eight dedicated inputs for push buttons, motion sensors, and door position sensors enable real-time monitoring and automated door control. ubiquiti access control hubs door access

records.name: Ubiquiti Ethernet Surge Protector
records.short_description: Connect the ground and Ethernet cables in between your network devices
records.searchText: ubiquiti ethernet surge protector ubiquiti eth-sp-g2 eth-sp-g2 surge protectors surge protectors ubiquiti accessory tech power solutions connect the ground and ethernet cables in between your network devices the ubiquiti ethernet surge protector (eth-sp-g2) is designed to safeguard outdoor ethernet installations from electrostatic discharge and electrical surges that can damage sensitive networking equipment. built specifically for high-speed outdoor deployments, this compact device protects ethernet-connected hardware such as access points, cameras, bridges, and base stations operating in exposed environments. the protector features two passive surge-protected rj45 connections that act as a secure inline barrier between outdoor devices and the rest of the network infrastructure. by diverting harmful transient voltages away from connected equipment, it helps prevent failures caused by lightning-induced surges, static buildup, or unexpected electrical spikes. this makes it especially valuable for installations on rooftops, poles, towers, and building exteriors where environmental exposure increases electrical risk. ubiquiti surge protectors accessory tech power solutions accessories tech

records.name: Ubiquiti Fiber Strain Relief Kit
records.short_description: The Fiber Strain Relief Kit stands as a robust and versatile solution for managing and protecting fiber optic cables. Its UV-resistant construction ensures durability and resilience against the elements, making it ideal for outdoor deployment. This kit seamlessly mounts on poles or walls, offering flexibility in placement and compatibility with various installation scenarios. The supported pole diameter range spanning from 35 to 60 mm.
records.searchText: ubiquiti fiber strain relief kit ubiquiti uacc-fiber-sr-kit uacc-fiber-sr-kit boxes & cases boxes & cases ubiquiti cables and cabinets the fiber strain relief kit stands as a robust and versatile solution for managing and protecting fiber optic cables. its uv-resistant construction ensures durability and resilience against the elements, making it ideal for outdoor deployment. this kit seamlessly mounts on poles or walls, offering flexibility in placement and compatibility with various installation scenarios. the supported pole diameter range spanning from 35 to 60 mm. the fiber strain relief kit features a detachable reel, that is designed to organize and reduce physical strain on fiber optic cabling. this reel helps to prevent tangling and excessive tension that can cause damage. the fiber strain relief kit effectively protects fiber optic cables, minimizing the risk of damage and ensuring seamless connectivity in outdoor environments. this kit extends the lifespan of fiber optic cabling, contributing to the overall reliability and efficiency of your network infrastructure. ubiquiti boxes & cases cables and cabinets

records.name: MikroTik 1G Outdoor Fiber to Copper Converter
records.short_description: Fiber to Copper converter, Outdoor Case, 12-57V PoE with 802.3af/at Support
records.searchText: mikrotik 1g outdoor fiber to copper converter mikrotik rbftc11 rbftc11 convertors convertors fiber products converters fiber to copper converter, outdoor case, 12-57v poe with 802.3af/at support the mikrotik rbftc11 is a robust fiber to copper converter designed for both indoor and outdoor installations. unlike typical media converters, it comes in a durable waterproof housing with a lock screw, ensuring protection against harsh environments. its mounting bracket can be secured from inside the case, adding an extra layer of stability and security for professional deployments. equipped with one gigabit sfp port and one 10/100/1000 mbps ethernet port, the rbftc11 supports seamless integration between fiber and copper networks. the device is powered via 12–57v poe with full ieee 802.3af/at support, and it includes both a poe injector and power supply for flexible installation. with a maximum power consumption of just 3 w and passive cooling, it ensures energy-efficient and reliable operation. certified with ce, eac, and rohs, the rbftc11 is tested to operate in extreme conditions from -40°c to +70°c, making it ideal for industrial environments, remote locations, or outdoor network extensions. supporting only gigabit sfp connections, this converter delivers high-performance, long-term stability in demanding networking scenarios. mikrotik convertors fiber products converters ubiquiti fiber

records.searchText: mikrotik hot swap psu 12pow150 mikrotik 12pow150 12pow150 power adapters power adapters compatible with ccr1072 and ccr2216, 12v 150w ac/dc the mikrotik hot swap psu 12pow150 is a reliable and efficient 12v 150w ac/dc power supply module designed for uninterrupted operation in high-performance networking environments. it is compatible with mikrotik router models ccr1072-1g-8s+, ccr2216-1g-12xs-2xq, and crs518-16xs-2xq-rm, all of which are equipped with two redundant power supplies for maximum reliability. if one unit fails, the second one automatically takes over, ensuring your network equipment continues to run smoothly. the hot swap feature allows you to replace a faulty or aging power supply while the device is still running — there’s no need to shut down or reboot the router. this minimizes downtime and helps maintain consistent network performance even in critical environments. built for durability and easy maintenance, the 12pow150 delivers stable power output and long-lasting reliability. it’s an ideal choice for professional data centers and telecom setups that demand continuous operation without interruptions. mikrotik power adapters

records.name: MikroTik ATL 5G R16
records.short_description: Outdoor 5G router with integrated 4x4 MIMO directional antenna, Quectel RG520F-EU 5G modem, supports 5G NR Sub-6GHz, LTE Cat20 (2.0 Gbps download), 1x Gigabit Ethernet port, 512 MB RAM, 32 MB storage, dual SIM (Micro-SIM + eSIM), RouterOS L3. Features IP66 weatherproof enclosure, PoE-in support, wide operating temperature range (-40°C to 70°C).
records.searchText: mikrotik atl 5g r16 mikrotik atlgm&rg520f-eu atlgm&rg520f-eu 5g routers 5g routers mikrotik mobile network products atl outdoor 5g router with integrated 4x4 mimo directional antenna, quectel rg520f-eu 5g modem, supports 5g nr sub-6ghz, lte cat20 (2.0 gbps download), 1x gigabit ethernet port, 512 mb ram, 32 mb storage, dual sim (micro-sim + esim), routeros l3. features ip66 weatherproof enclosure, poe-in support, wide operating temperature range (-40°c to 70°c). the mikrotik atl 5g r16 (atlgm&rg520f-eu) is a powerful outdoor lte/5g modem designed for fast, stable, and secure wireless internet connectivity in remote and urban environments. it features a built-in quectel 5g modem (model rg520f-eu) supporting 5g nr, lte fdd, lte tdd, and 3g technologies., offering a wide range of band support for flexible deployment across europe and beyond. with support for sub-6ghz 5g and lte cat 20, it delivers ultra-fast speeds and low latency, making it ideal for streaming, remote work, industrial monitoring, or serving as the backbone of rural internet access. the atl 5g r16 includes a gigabit ethernet port, passive poe-in support (12–57 v), and a durable outdoor-rated enclosure with ip-rated protection, ensuring consistent performance in harsh weather conditions. mikrotik 5g routers mobile network products atl ubiquiti mobile network

records.name: MikroTik ATL LTE18 kit
records.short_description: Fast CAT 18 LTE Modem, Gigabit Ethernet with PoE-In, 64-Bit Dual-Core ARM CPU, High-Gain Antenna, Snow-Resistant, 4X4 MIMO Support, LTE Band 28, 700 MHz - 1 GHz Support
records.searchText: mikrotik atl lte18 kit mikrotik atlgm&eg18-ea atlgm&eg18-ea 4g/5g integrated antennas 4g/5g integrated antennas lte products mobile network products atl fast cat 18 lte modem, gigabit ethernet with poe-in, 64-bit dual-core arm cpu, high-gain antenna, snow-resistant, 4x4 mimo support, lte band 28, 700 mhz - 1 ghz support atl lte18 kit is mikrotik’s new lte solution for connectivity in rural and urban areas. it’s designed to provide fast and stable internet, regardless of your phone signal or the weather. atl features a category 18 lte modem and a gigabit ethernet port with poe-in - in combination with the arm cpu, it allows the speed up to 1 gbps. one of the main features of the atl lte18 kit is the 4x4 mimo (multiple-input, multiple-output support). higher speed and better signal are provided by 4 high-gain middle bands (1.7 – 2.7 ghz) and 2 high-gain low band antennas (700 mhz – 1 ghz, lte band 28). since most mobile operators in the world use the 700 and 800 mhz lte, and, considering that the lower frequency can travel further - atl will always be able to find some signal. the device is designed resistant to snow and water, which will prevent it from collecting water or freezing in low temperatures. mikrotik 4g/5g integrated antennas lte products mobile network products atl antennas ubiquiti mobile network

records.searchText: mikrotik automotive power adapter apa-1 mikrotik apa-1 apa-1 power adapters power adapters multi-layer protection. the apa-1 automotive power adapter safeguards your devices from aggressive vehicle environments, ensuring their safety and operational integrity. its comprehensive protection features effectively neutralize voltage spikes, preventing damage caused by faulty car batteries, harness coupling, jump-starting, or even switching the ac unit. the built-in gas discharge tube serves as a key component in this protection system. when subjected to high voltage, the gas ionizes, creating a low-resistance path for the excess voltage to dissipate, effectively neutralizing the spike and shielding your devices from harm. the inclusion of a transient voltage suppressor (tvs) semiconductor complements the gas discharge tube, providing an extra layer of defense against extreme voltage spikes. this combination ensures that your devices remain protected even from the most severe electrical hazards. in addition to these primary protection features, the apa-1 employs active polarity protection, preventing damage caused by accidental power reversal. this feature detects and corrects any polarity errors, ensuring that your devices are safeguarded even in instances of improper power connection. the output voltage can be easily modified via jumper position, but there’s also a pass-through mode – in case if you don’t need input voltage regulation. mikrotik power adapters

records.name: MikroTik Fiber-to-Copper Converter
records.searchText: mikrotik fiber-to-copper converter mikrotik ftc11xg ftc11xg fiber networks fiber networks fiber products converters the ftc11xg is a powerful fiber-to-copper converter built to withstand the elements. its ip55 weatherproof rating protects it from rain, dust, and other environmental challenges, making it ideal for outdoor deployments or harsh indoor environments. this versatile converter seamlessly transforms your 10 gigabit sfp+ fiber connections into familiar rj45 10 gigabit ethernet, bridging the gap between your fiber backbone and copper network devices. the ftc11xg boasts exceptional low power consumption (9-10 w) and flexible power options. choose from a standard dc jack or 802.3 af/at/bt 43-57 v poe-in for powering the converter. to simplify installation, the package includes a poe injector, power supply, and even a mounting kit for easy ceiling installation. the converter runs a full version of swos lite and features its own switch chip. ftc11xg has a range of advanced features, including interface management and monitoring, vlan support, snmp reporting and basic traffic shaping. the ftc11xg takes network security to the next level with its advanced packet filtering capabilities. the built-in access control list (acl) acts as a powerful network tool, allowing you to filter packets based on various criteria like source/destination ip, port numbers, and protocols. you can track and account for network traffic, and also implement vlan tagging for robust network segmentation. mikrotik fiber networks fiber products converters ubiquiti fiber

records.name: Mikrotik KNOT Embedded LTE4
records.short_description: Compact industrial gateway with LTE Cat4, dual SIM (Nano-SIM + eSIM), 1x Gigabit Ethernet port, PoE-in, 2x2 MIMO, external antenna support (LTE, GNSS, Bluetooth), GPIO header, GNSS (GPS, GLONASS, Galileo, BeiDou), RouterOS L3. Requires external antennas (not included).
records.searchText: mikrotik knot embedded lte4 mikrotik ec25-eu&kne ec25-eu&kne 4g gateways 4g gateways mikrotik mobile network products 4g routers compact industrial gateway with lte cat4, dual sim (nano-sim + esim), 1x gigabit ethernet port, poe-in, 2x2 mimo, external antenna support (lte, gnss, bluetooth), gpio header, gnss (gps, glonass, galileo, beidou), routeros l3. requires external antennas (not included). the mikrotik knot embedded lte4 (ec25-eu&kne) is a compact industrial gateway designed for integrators, automation engineers, and iot system builders who need reliable connectivity in constrained or embedded installations. equipped with lte cat4 mobile connectivity, it supports high-quality cellular uplinks across a broad selection of lte fdd and tdd bands used throughout europe and many global regions. the device integrates a gigabit ethernet port for high-speed lan connectivity and offers poe-in support, simplifying power delivery through a single cable in cabinet, rack, or industrial automation systems. a key feature is its dual sim system (nano-sim + esim), ensuring network redundancy and uninterrupted service in mission-critical deployments. the unit includes 2×2 mimo lte for enhanced radio performance and stable signal handling. because it is designed for embedded and industrial projects, it is delivered without internal antennas and requires external lte, gnss, and bluetooth antennas, offering installation flexibility and optimal rf performance inside metal cabinets, automation housings, or machinery. with solid build quality, small physical dimensions, and industrial mounting support, the knot embedded lte4 integrates seamlessly into compact automation panels, distributed control systems, small cabinets, and iot edge nodes. mikrotik 4g gateways mobile network products 4g routers iot products gateways ubiquiti mobile network

records.name: MikroTik L009UiGS-RM
records.short_description: Dual-Core ARM CPU 800 MHz, 8x Gigabit Ethernet Ports, 1G SFP Cage, USB 3.0, PoE-in & PoE-out, 512MB RAM, Console Port
records.searchText: mikrotik l009uigs-rm mikrotik l009uigs-rm l009uigs-rm wired routers wired routers ethernet routers routerboard dual-core arm cpu 800 mhz, 8x gigabit ethernet ports, 1g sfp cage, usb 3.0, poe-in & poe-out, 512mb ram, console port replacing the well-known rb2011 series, the l009uigs-rm model offers a seamless blend of higher speeds, advanced functionalities, and a raft of quality-of-life improvements. the mikrotik l009uigs-rm has a modern dual-core cpu that is powered by the arm cpu architecture and is up to 4 times faster than older models, - which allows it to optimize advanced routeros functions like routing and complex firewall rules. in practice, this allows for more granular control over your network, making it easier to set up secured vlans for different departments in a business setting, or to implement comprehensive qos rules for prioritizing voice and video traffic at home. its processing power significantly reduces latency, making real-time communication applications like video conferencing smoother and more reliable. the router's high-performance cpu also offers ipsec hardware encryption, for modern businesses that rely on vpns for secure, remote data access. the router's hardware encryption keeps your data safe without slowing down performance, unlike software-based options. this is particularly beneficial for remote teams who need to access sensitive company data without sacrificing speed or security. the mikrotik l009uigs-rm has 8 fast ethernet ports for more than just quick data transfer. the first port supports poe-in, allowing the device to be powered through the ethernet connection itself. this is useful in tough setups like outdoor surveillance or remote work where regular power outlets are hard to find. the last port can also power other devices if the router is plugged into a dc jack, which makes your network setup easier. for instance, you could power a secondary device like a security camera, access point, or even another router, directly from this router without needing separate power supplies for each device. the router's sfp cage supports current and future speed needs, so you can boost your network without getting a new router. boost your data speeds with the fast marvell peridot switch chip, offering 2.5 gigabit connections to the cpu for all ports except ether1. whether you're a business needing fast file transfers between departments, or a content creator handling large multimedia files, the marvell peridot switch chip makes sure your data reaches its destination quickly and smoothly. ether1 has its own dedicated gigabit full-duplex line to the cpu: this separate channel ensures that specific tasks or services you may designate to this port, like a connection to your internet service provider, can operate without interference from other network activities. the router's case acts as a large heat sink, helping to keep the device cool and lower the risk of overheating — a router that can effectively dissipate heat is crucial for long-term reliability and performance. this router is excellent at making the most of the available space. up to four of these power-packed devices can fit into a single 1u rackmount space. this lets you boost your network's power fourfold while keeping things neat and efficient. this is especially beneficial for data centers, server rooms, or any high-density networking environment. mikrotik wired routers ethernet routers routerboard mikrotik ethernet routers routerboards wi-fi for home & office ubiquiti wired

records.name: MikroTik RB1100AHx4
records.short_description: CPU AL21400 4 cores 1.4GHz, 1GB RAM, 13x Gbit LAN, RouterOS L6, Rackmount Case 1U.*Maximum order quantity per customer: 5 units
records.searchText: mikrotik rb1100ahx4 mikrotik rb1100x4 rb1100x4 wired routers wired routers ethernet routers routerboard cpu al21400 4 cores 1.4ghz, 1gb ram, 13x gbit lan, routeros l6, rackmount case 1u.*maximum order quantity per customer: 5 units the rb1100ahx4 series from mikrotik represents a powerful solution for individuals and organizations seeking a high-performance, reliable routing solution. these routers are designed to handle demanding networking tasks with ease, providing users with the flexibility and power they need to support complex networks and high-speed connectivity. the mikrotik rb1100ahx4 is a powerful router designed for demanding networking tasks. like the dude edition, it is powered by the annapurna alpine al21400 cpu with four cortex a15 cores, each clocked at 1.4 ghz. the cortex a15 processor core stands out for its high performance and energy efficiency. the inclusion of the annapurna alpine al21400 cpu provides the router with a maximum throughput of up to 7.5 gbps, which ensures fast and reliable connectivity, making it a perfect fit for environments that demand high-speed data transmission. the device also supports ipsec hardware acceleration, which boosts the performance of ipsec vpns by using specialized hardware for encryption and decryption. this ensures secure and efficient ip communication. in tandem with ipsec hardware acceleration, the router supports aes128, an encryption algorithm widely adopted in various security protocols and systems. by striking a perfect balance between security and performance, aes128 ensures that your data remains confidential and secure while being transmitted efficiently across the network. the rb1100ahx4 is a versatile and powerful device, featuring 13 gigabit ethernet ports for high-speed network connections up to 1 gbps. housed in a 1u rackmount case, it fits neatly into a standard 19-inch server rack, taking up just 1.75 inches of vertical space. the device is equipped with an rs232 serial port, allowing for the connection of serial devices such as modems and printers. its dual redundant power supplies provide an added layer of reliability, ensuring that the network remains operational even in the event of a power failure. moreover, the device supports -48v dc telecom power, a standard used in telecommunications equipment; and the 802.3at/af power over ethernet (poe) standards, delivering electrical power to devices over ethernet cables, with up to 25.5 watts of power per port with poe+ (802.3at) and up to 15.4 watts per port with 802.3af. mikrotik wired routers ethernet routers routerboard mikrotik ethernet routers routerboards wi-fi for home & office ubiquiti wired

records.short_description: Smart Gigabit Switch, 5xGLAN Ethernet Ports, 1xSFP cage, SwOS
records.searchText: mikrotik rb260gs mikrotik css106-5g-1s css106-5g-1s switches switches cloud smart switch smart gigabit switch, 5xglan ethernet ports, 1xsfp cage, swos the mikrotik routerboard 260gs, also known as css106-5g-1s, is a compact soho switch that is exceptionally versatile yet straightforward in design and functionality. it features five gigabit ethernet ports and one sfp cage, making it suitable for a range of networking applications in small office/home office settings. driven by a powerful atheros qca8337 switch chip, the rb260gs ensures efficient handling of network traffic across its interfaces. the dimensions of 113x139x28mm make this device unobtrusive and ideal for environments where space is at a premium but network performance cannot be compromised. furthermore, this switch is designed to operate within a temperature range of -20°c to 70°c, demonstrating its reliability under varying environmental conditions. with a mean time between failures (mtbf) of approximately 100,000 hours at 25°c, the rb260gs is built to last and deliver continuous service. mikrotik switches cloud smart switch alfa ethernet devices

records.name: MikroTik hAP ac lite
records.short_description: 650MHz CPU, 64MB RAM, 5x LAN ports, 802.11a/b/g/n/ac, 2.4GHz 2 chains + 5GHz 1 chain , RouterOS L4
records.searchText: mikrotik hap ac lite mikrotik rb952ui-5ac2nd rb952ui-5ac2nd wifi routers wifi routers 650mhz cpu, 64mb ram, 5x lan ports, 802.11a/b/g/n/ac, 2.4ghz 2 chains + 5ghz 1 chain , routeros l4 enjoy a comprehensive and affordable home networking experience with the mikrotik hap ac lite, a dual-concurrent 2.4/5ghz access point designed for exceptional 802.11ac performance. featuring dual-chain 802.11b/g/n 2.4ghz wireless and single-chain 802.11a/n/ac 5ghz wireless capabilities, the hap ac lite delivers seamless wifi coverage across both frequencies, optimizing connectivity for various applications. compact yet robust, this device is equipped with a potent 650mhz cpu, effortlessly managing a spectrum of networking tasks. supported by 64mb of ram, it thrives in multitasking scenarios, ensuring smooth and efficient operations across diverse applications. the blend of a powerful cpu and ample ram makes this device a versatile and reliable ally for all your networking needs. at the heart of its operation is the routeros l4 license, the operating system developed by mikrotik for their routers and wireless systems. this license level, demonstrating a comprehensive feature set, empowers the hap ac lite with advanced capabilities suitable for managing small to medium-sized networks. the hap ac lite is equipped with five 10/100mbps ethernet ports, each supporting data transfer rates of 10 or 100 megabits per second (mbps). these ports serve as versatile connectors for various devices within your local network, ensuring seamless connectivity. enhancing its capabilities, the hap ac lite features poe-out on port 5, allowing it to supply power to other poe-compatible devices. this feature streamlines cabling and power distribution, making it ideal for powering devices like ip cameras. additionally, the usb-a 2.0 port opens the door to external connectivity, specifically designed to support 3g or 4g modems. the device further features passive poe input, enabling power to be supplied either through the conventional power jack or seamlessly via a poe injector. passive power over ethernet (poe) ensures a constant voltage delivery, enhancing the efficiency of power and data transmission through the same ethernet cable. mikrotik wifi routers

records.short_description: AR9331 CPU, 64MB RAM, 2x LAN ports, 802.11b/g/n, 1x microUSB, RouterOS L4
records.searchText: mikrotik map mikrotik rbmap2nd rbmap2nd access points access points map ar9331 cpu, 64mb ram, 2x lan ports, 802.11b/g/n, 1x microusb, routeros l4 the mikrotik map (micro access point), officially known as rbmap2nd, is a highly compact and versatile device designed to deliver efficient wireless connectivity and a variety of networking features within a small form factor. built on the mipsbe architecture and equipped with a qca9531 processor, the map operates at a nominal frequency of 650 mhz. it integrates the same model qca9531-bl3a-r as its switch chip, enhancing its processing and switching capabilities. the map is a tiny size wireless dual-chain 2.4ghz access point with full routeros capabilities. it is very portable, since it accepts power from a wide variety of sources - usb, passive poe and power jack. it also works as a poe injector - the second ethernet port provides up to 500ma of power to another device, for example, you can connect a sxt cpe device to it. mikrotik access points map wi-fi for home & office ubiquiti unifi access points

records.searchText: ubiquiti unifi switch mission critical ubiquiti usw-mission-critical usw-mission-critical switches switches home and office networks mission critical switch, 1x gbe rj45, 4xgbe poe+, 4x gbe poe++, 1.3" touchscreen, 368wh li-ion battery the ubiquiti unifi switch mission critical (usw-mission-critical) combines advanced networking with integrated power backup to ensure your network stays online during power interruptions. equipped with a built-in 368wh lithium-ion battery, this switch delivers uninterrupted power over ethernet (poe) to up to eight devices, including high-powered access points and surveillance cameras. featuring 4 gbe poe+ ports and 4 gbe poe++ ports with a total poe budget of 120w, it supports devices requiring up to 64w per port. two 230v ac outputs provide additional power options for connected equipment. this switch includes a dedicated gbe uplink for seamless network integration. designed for critical applications such as enterprise environments, emergency response, and service providers, it minimizes downtime and guarantees continuous connectivity even during outages, securing your essential network infrastructure. ubiquiti switches home and office networks alfa ethernet devices mikrotik

records.name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Ultra 60W
records.searchText: ubiquiti unifi switch ultra 60w ubiquiti usw-ultra-60w usw-ultra-60w switches switches utility the ubiquiti unifi switch ultra 60w (usw-ultra-60w) is a compact yet highly capable layer 2 switch designed for modern, space-constrained network environments. with 8 gigabit ethernet rj45 ports, it provides reliable wired connectivity for offices, retail spaces, and smart home installations. the switch features seven poe+ ports for powering compatible devices such as access points, ip cameras, and voip phones, along with one poe++ input port that enables flexible power delivery to the switch itself. designed with adaptability in mind, the usw-ultra-60w supports multiple power input methods, including dc input, poe++, and an external ac/dc adapter (included). it operates within a supported voltage range of 50–57v dc/poe, allowing seamless integration into existing unifi infrastructures. its compact form factor supports desktop, wall, and magnetic mounting, making it easy to deploy in cabinets, under desks, or directly on metal surfaces. the durable polycarbonate enclosure keeps the device lightweight at just 320 g, while still offering long-term reliability. built for real-world conditions, the switch supports extended ambient operating temperatures, reaching -30 to 60°c with poe++ input and -20 to 45°c when powered by a 60w ac adapter. this makes it suitable for both indoor and semi-industrial environments where temperature tolerance matters. note: poe input is supported for switch operation, but poe+/poe++ input or ac power is required for poe output, ensuring predictable and stable power behavior across deployments. at its core, the unifi switch ultra 60w delivers consistent and efficient data handling through a powerful non-blocking layer 2 switching architecture. with a switching capacity of 16 gbps and total non-blocking throughput of 8 gbps, the switch ensures smooth, congestion-free communication across all connected devices, even in traffic-dense environments. the switch achieves a forwarding rate of 12 million packets per second (mpps), enabling fast packet processing for latency-sensitive applications such as video streaming, ip telephony, and real-time collaboration tools. support for up to 256 vlans allows for precise network segmentation, improving security and performance by isolating traffic between departments, devices, or applications. a mac address table size of 4,000 entries ensures stable operation in growing networks with numerous endpoints. the usw-ultra-60w is engineered with a rich set of layer 2 features commonly found in enterprise-class switches. these include stp and rstp for loop prevention, loop protection, and storm control to safeguard against broadcast, multicast, or unknown unicast traffic spikes. traffic management capabilities such as egress rate limiting, flow control, and multicast and broadcast rate limiting help administrators fine-tune bandwidth usage. port isolation enhances security by restricting direct communication between selected ports, while port mirroring simplifies troubleshooting and network analysis. support for jumbo frames improves efficiency in data-intensive applications by reducing protocol overhead. collectively, these features make the usw-ultra-60w an excellent choice for users who require enterprise-grade network stability and granular traffic control in a compact, cost-effective device. power delivery is one of the key strengths of the unifi switch ultra 60w, offering flexible and scalable poe availability to match a wide range of deployment scenarios. each poe-capable port can deliver up to 30w (poe+), making it suitable for demanding devices such as wi-fi access points and ptz cameras. the total poe budget varies depending on the power source: 42w with poe++ input, 16w with poe+ input, 42w with a 60w poe adapter, 52w with a 60w ac adapter, and up to an impressive 202w when powered by a 210w ac adapter. this modular approach allows installers to scale power capacity without replacing the switch. despite its capabilities, the switch remains energy-efficient. maximum power consumption excluding poe output is just 9w with poe input or 8w with adapter input, while maximum consumption including poe output reaches 210w when using a 210w ac adapter. heat output is minimal, with 15 btu/hr excluding poe output, supporting silent, fanless operation. the switch is fully managed via ethernet using the unifi network application (version 8.0.7 or later), enabling centralized configuration, monitoring, and firmware updates. it is ndaa compliant and certified for global deployment, including ce, fcc, ic, and anatel approvals. together, intelligent power management, compliance readiness, and seamless unifi integration make the usw-ultra-60w a dependable foundation for scalable, professionally managed networks. ubiquiti switches utility alfa ethernet devices mikrotik unifi switching

records.searchText: ubiquiti cwdm mux demux 4 ubiquiti uacc-cwdm-4 uacc-cwdm-4 fiber products fiber products fiber networks cwdm the ubiquiti cwdm mux demux 4 (uacc-cwdm-4) is a rack-mountable solution designed to enhance the capacity of existing fiber optic infrastructure by multiplexing and demultiplexing four separate data channels. the ubiquiti cwdm mux demux 4 (uacc-cwdm-4) is a rack-mountable solution designed to enhance the capacity of existing fiber optic infrastructure by multiplexing and demultiplexing four separate data channels. by utilizing coarse wavelength division multiplexing (cwdm) technology, this device enables the transmission of multiple data channels (1270, 1290, 1310, and 1330 nm) over a single fiber optic cable. this allows network administrators to expand the bandwidth of their fiber networks without the need to lay additional cables, making it a cost-effective solution for high-capacity data transfer in enterprise and data center environments. ideal for applications that demand high-bandwidth connections, the cwdm mux demux ensures seamless integration with ubiquiti's aggregation switches, such as the usw-aggregation and usw-pro-aggregation. ubiquiti fiber products fiber networks cwdm mikrotik fiber

records.searchText: ubiquiti easy cable, 2-pack ubiquiti uacc-cable-extender-c6a uacc-cable-extender-c6a twisted pair twisted pair cables and cabinets ubiquiti accessory tech cabling compact category 6a extension cable, 0.185 m length, ultra-thin 3.5 mm jacket, poe+++ support, ipx6 waterproof cap end. the ubiquiti easy cable (uacc-cable-extender-c6a), is a compact and versatile extension cable designed for tight installation environments and precise last-inch connectivity. built to the category 6a standard, it ensures reliable data and power delivery and supports poe up to poe+++. its ultra-thin 3.5 mm jacket makes it easy to route through narrow spaces, inside equipment enclosures, or within dense cable runs. the cable length is 0.15 m without the waterproof cap and 0.185 m with the cap, making it ideal for short-range connections where exact length and neat routing are required. the durable thermoplastic elastomer (tpe) jacket provides flexibility, and the 14 mm minimum bend radius helps prevent damage during installation. each pack includes two cables, offering a convenient solution for multiple devices or backup use in both indoor and outdoor scenarios. ubiquiti twisted pair cables and cabinets accessory tech cabling accessories tech

records.name: Ubiquiti Entry Sensor
records.short_description: The Ubiquiti Entry Sensor (USL-Entry) is a compact and precise SuperLink door and window sensor designed to provide dependable open/close monitoring in residential, commercial, or industrial environments.
records.searchText: ubiquiti entry sensor ubiquiti usl-entry usl-entry access control access control special devices camera security ubiquiti the ubiquiti entry sensor (usl-entry) is a compact and precise superlink door and window sensor designed to provide dependable open/close monitoring in residential, commercial, or industrial environments. the ubiquiti entry sensor (usl-entry) is a compact and precise superlink door and window sensor designed to provide dependable open/close monitoring in residential, commercial, or industrial environments. its main sensor unit measures 75.5 × 23.5 × 22.5 mm, while the magnet measures 39 × 15.1 × 12.9 mm, allowing the complete assembly to remain discreet when mounted on frames of different sizes. built around a durable polycarbonate housing, the sensor delivers long-lasting performance and a clean, modern look that blends naturally with most interior surfaces. a built-in reed switch detects changes in door or window position and reports them instantly to the unifi protect system. power is supplied by a replaceable cr123a lithium battery, which enables up to 6 years of battery life, minimizing maintenance needs. installation is straightforward — you can use either adhesive mounting for simple placement or screws for added mechanical security. with its compact construction, long lifespan, and reliable triggering, the entry sensor is an effective and unobtrusive security add-on for any property. ubiquiti access control special devices camera security unifi access points

records.name: Ubiquiti Environmental Sensor
records.short_description: The UniFi Environmental Sensor is designed to keep you informed about critical environmental conditions. It features multiple built-in sensors: temperature, humidity, ambient light, and water detection. An AUX jack accepts a probe for water leaks for extra flexibility.
records.searchText: ubiquiti environmental sensor ubiquiti usl-environmental usl-environmental access control access control security systems the unifi environmental sensor is designed to keep you informed about critical environmental conditions. it features multiple built-in sensors: temperature, humidity, ambient light, and water detection. an aux jack accepts a probe for water leaks for extra flexibility. the unifi environmental sensor is designed to keep you informed about critical environmental conditions. it features multiple built-in sensors: temperature, humidity, ambient light, and water detection. an aux jack accepts a probe for water leaks for extra flexibility. it operates on a replaceable lithium cr123a battery, delivering up to six years of use under normal conditions. connection is via ubiquiti’s proprietary superlink wireless protocol, offering long-range transmission up to two kilometers (in ideal conditions), and very low power usage at around 35 milliwatts. the supported voltage is nominal 3 v. operating frequency varies by region: us models use ~915-927 mhz, while eu versions use ~865-869 mhz. the built-in led indicators provide clear feedback on device status and signal strength, while the reset and function buttons make testing and maintenance simple. all of which makes it ideal for continuously monitoring your spaces for leaks, comfort, and ambient light without frequent battery changes. ubiquiti access control security systems

records.name: Ubiquiti Ethernet Surge Protection
records.short_description: Protect your critical network infrastructure with the Ubiquiti UACC‑ETH‑SP‑DIN, designed for bidirectional protection of Ethernet connections up to 10 Gbps. This robust surge protector supports PoE++ and shields your devices from electrostatic discharge (ESD) and electromagnetic pulse (EMP) events.
records.searchText: ubiquiti ethernet surge protection ubiquiti uacc-eth-sp-din uacc-eth-sp-din surge protectors surge protectors ubiquiti protect your critical network infrastructure with the ubiquiti uacc‑eth‑sp‑din, designed for bidirectional protection of ethernet connections up to 10 gbps. this robust surge protector supports poe++ and shields your devices from electrostatic discharge (esd) and electromagnetic pulse (emp) events. protect your critical network infrastructure with the ubiquiti uacc‑eth‑sp‑din, designed for bidirectional protection of ethernet connections up to 10 gbps. this robust surge protector supports poe++ and shields your devices from electrostatic discharge (esd) and electromagnetic pulse (emp) events. with a discharge capacity of 20 ka and a fast response to voltage surges (from 100 v/s to 1 kv/µs), it effectively absorbs transient currents to prevent damage. the compact design allows easy installation on walls or din rails, making it ideal for structured cabling environments. built from durable polycarbonate and sgcc steel, it withstands indoor conditions with an operating temperature range of −40 °c to +80 °c. whether in enterprise networks, data centers, or industrial settings, the uacc‑eth‑sp‑din ensures your high-speed connections remain safe and uninterrupted. ubiquiti surge protectors

records.name: Ubiquiti Ethernet Surge Protection 24-Port
records.searchText: ubiquiti ethernet surge protection 24-port ubiquiti uacc-eth-sp-panel-24 uacc-eth-sp-panel-24 surge protectors surge protectors ubiquiti accessory tech power solutions the ubiquiti uacc-eth-sp-panel-24 is a robust 24-port ethernet surge protector designed for indoor rack installations. supporting data rates up to 10 gbps and poe++, it ensures reliable protection for your critical network infrastructure. each port delivers 20ka discharge capacity with rapid response to surges (from 100 v/s to 1 kv/µs), safeguarding devices from esd and emp events. the 1u rack-mount form factor integrates seamlessly into standard network racks, making it ideal for enterprise networks, data centers, and industrial environments. built with durable sgcc steel, the panel withstands harsh operating conditions ranging from -40° to +80°c. with minimal signal loss (capacitance only 1.0 pf at 1 mhz), it maintains high-speed connectivity while ensuring full poe support. whether protecting switches, routers, or access points, this panel provides professional-grade protection in a compact and efficient design. ubiquiti surge protectors accessory tech power solutions accessories tech

records.name: Ubiquiti Ethernet Surge Protection Outdoor
records.short_description: The Ubiquiti Ethernet Surge Protection Outdoor (UACC-ETH-SP-Pro) is designed to protect outdoor Ethernet equipment from electrical surges caused by lightning strikes, electrostatic discharge, and transient overvoltage events.
records.searchText: ubiquiti ethernet surge protection outdoor ubiquiti uacc-eth-sp-pro uacc-eth-sp-pro surge protectors surge protectors ubiquiti the ubiquiti ethernet surge protection outdoor (uacc-eth-sp-pro) is designed to protect outdoor ethernet equipment from electrical surges caused by lightning strikes, electrostatic discharge, and transient overvoltage events. the ubiquiti ethernet surge protection outdoor (uacc-eth-sp-pro) is designed to protect outdoor ethernet equipment from electrical surges caused by lightning strikes, electrostatic discharge, and transient overvoltage events. outdoor network deployments are especially vulnerable to these risks, and even short electrical spikes can permanently damage connected devices. this surge protector acts as a critical defensive layer between outdoor cabling and sensitive network hardware. the device is intended for use with outdoor access points, wireless bridges, cameras, and other ethernet-based equipment installed on rooftops, poles, or exterior walls. by diverting excessive electrical energy away from connected devices, it helps prevent costly failures, downtime, and replacement expenses. protection is applied directly to ethernet data lines, ensuring network continuity without impacting normal operation. designed for modern networks, the uacc-eth-sp-pro supports high-speed ethernet connections and power over ethernet, making it suitable for both data-only and poe-powered installations. its passive design allows it to be inserted inline without configuration or software, providing immediate protection once installed. for any outdoor ethernet deployment where reliability and equipment safety are priorities, this device is a practical and essential component. ubiquiti surge protectors

records.searchText: ubiquiti g3 gate access starter kit ubiquiti ua-g3-sk-gate ua-g3-sk-gate access control access control ubiquiti the ubiquiti g3 gate access starter kit (ua-g3-sk-gate) is a complete solution for managing a single gate and an auxiliary side door. the kit includes the gate hub, g3 intercom, poe++ adapter, two retrofit 2-wire extenders, and mounting hardware for professional installation. the gate hub, measuring 175 × 126 × 26 mm, mounts easily on a din rail and features a durable polycarbonate enclosure for indoor use. for outdoor installations, a waterproof junction box is recommended. the included poe++ adapter powers both the gate hub and downstream devices. the retrofit extenders allow integration with existing wiring, while the g3 intercom provides visual and audio verification for visitors. with 10 free touch pass licenses, mobile credential management is ready out of the box. designed for residential, commercial, or gated environments, this kit offers secure, modern, and flexible access control with professional-grade reliability. ubiquiti access control

records.searchText: ubiquiti gateway enterprise ubiquiti uxg-enterprise uxg-enterprise wired routers wired routers ubiquiti cloud keys & gateways the ubiquiti uxg-enterprise is a powerful enterprise-class gateway designed to deliver exceptional network performance and security for medium to large organizations. built with an 18-core arm v8.2 processor running at 2 ghz and 16 gb of system memory, it handles high-throughput tasks with ease, including firewall inspection, vpn connections, and deep packet inspection. the ubiquiti uxg-enterprise is a powerful enterprise-class gateway designed to deliver exceptional network performance and security for medium to large organizations. built with an 18-core arm v8.2 processor running at 2 ghz and 16 gb of system memory, it handles high-throughput tasks with ease, including firewall inspection, vpn connections, and deep packet inspection. the device supports up to 1 million concurrent sessions and features ids/ips throughput of 12.5 gbps, ensuring robust security without sacrificing speed. vpn performance includes up to 980 mbps for wireguard, 580 mbps for ipsec, and 180 mbps for openvpn, accommodating demanding remote access scenarios. with dual hot-swappable 150 w crps power supplies and full 1u rack-mount design, the uxg-enterprise guarantees reliable, continuous operation in professional network environments. this combination of high processing power, extensive memory, and advanced security features makes it an ideal solution for organizations seeking both speed and protection in a unified gateway. ubiquiti wired routers cloud keys & gateways mikrotik iot products gateways wired

records.name: Ubiquiti Long-Range Ethernet Repeater
records.short_description: (1) GbE RJ45 port for 802.3af/at PoE/PoE+ input, (1) GbE RJ45 port for passthrough PoE output, 10kA+ surge protection
records.searchText: ubiquiti long-range ethernet repeater ubiquiti uacc-lre uacc-lre ethernet repeaters ethernet repeaters ubiquiti (1) gbe rj45 port for 802.3af/at poe/poe+ input, (1) gbe rj45 port for passthrough poe output, 10ka+ surge protection the ubiquiti long-range ethernet repeater (uacc-lre) is designed to extend poe-powered ethernet connections far beyond standard limitations. while traditional ethernet runs are limited to 100 meters, this repeater allows networks to reach distances of up to 1 kilometer when deployed in 100-meter increments. it is an ideal solution for connecting remote ip cameras, access points, sensors, or other poe-powered devices across large outdoor areas, industrial sites, campuses, parking facilities, or perimeter installations. the device features two gigabit ethernet ports: one for poe or poe+ input and one for passthrough poe output, ensuring both data and power continue seamlessly to downstream devices. with a total non-blocking throughput of 2 gbps and a switching capacity of 4 gbps, the repeater maintains stable, full-speed gigabit performance even over extended distances. its extremely low power consumption of just 1.5 w (excluding poe output) ensures efficient operation without adding unnecessary load to the power source. designed for professional deployments, the uacc-lre is best powered by unifi switches to ensure full compatibility with its 2-pair poe mode. ubiquiti ethernet repeaters

records.searchText: ubiquiti surge protection connector shd ubiquiti uisp-connector-shd uisp-connector-shd twisted pair twisted pair cables and cabinets ubiquiti accessory tech cabling shielded rj45 connectors, 100 pcs the uisp-connector-shd, or surge protection connector shd, from ubiquiti is a sophisticated device engineered to enhance the resilience and durability of network installations by providing robust surge protection. designed to work seamlessly with ubiquiti's networking products, this surge protector is essential for protecting sensitive equipment from the potentially damaging effects of electrical surges and spikes. constructed with a rugged exterior, the uisp-connector-shd integrates state-of-the-art surge protection technology. it utilizes gas discharge tubes (gdt) for primary surge protection, which effectively dissipates a high voltage surge to the ground, safeguarding the connected equipment. for finer protection, it incorporates metal oxide varistors (movs) that absorb excess voltage and prevent it from reaching the network devices, thereby offering a secondary layer of defense against voltage spikes. this model features a modular design with easy-to-connect interfaces, ensuring quick installation and maintenance. it is equipped with shielded rj45 connectors, which not only facilitate secure electrical connections but also enhance signal integrity by reducing electromagnetic interference (emi). the connectors are designed to maintain a tight, waterproof seal, enhancing the device's durability and making it suitable for outdoor environments where exposure to elements such as rain and humidity is common. ubiquiti twisted pair cables and cabinets accessory tech cabling accessories tech

enterprise installations. it features a solid bare copper conductor (23 awg) for superior conductivity and reliability, while the anti‑crosstalk divider minimizes signal interference for consistent 10 gbps ethernet performance. the unshielded twisted pair (utp) design simplifies installation without sacrificing speed or stability. built with a durable pvc jacket (7.05 ± 0.2 mm diameter) and integrated ripcord, it offers easy handling and robust protection during deployment. rated cmr (riser) for flame resistance, it supports safe installations in vertical spaces. suitable for installation temperatures between 0°c and 60°c, it delivers dependable performance for professional networking setups. the uacc‑cable‑c6a‑cmr ensures reliable high‑bandwidth connectivity for modern unifi deployments. engineered to meet category 6a standards, it supports 10 gbe connections across long distances while maintaining low signal loss. its solid copper cores provide durability and excellent signal quality, ideal for powering critical applications like voip, video streaming, and large data transfers. the utp structure, combined with the anti‑crosstalk divider, reduces electromagnetic interference between pairs, ensuring clean, uninterrupted data flow. flame‑retardant cmr rating allows use in riser spaces, meeting stringent safety standards for indoor use. with a 305 m spool, installers can efficiently run structured cabling in large buildings. easy to pull, flexible to work with, and designed for professional environments, this cat6a cable is the ideal choice for upgrading enterprise networks to handle next‑generation bandwidth demands. ubiquiti indoor cables cabling accessories tech

records.name: Ubiquiti UniFi WAN Switch
records.searchText: ubiquiti unifi wan switch ubiquiti usw-wan usw-wan switches switches utility the ubiquiti unifi wan switch is purpose-built to ensure reliable and uninterrupted connectivity in high-availability network environments. designed to link two unifi gateways operating in shadow mode to a single internet service provider, it enables seamless failover and consistent wan access. this architecture is ideal for organizations that require continuous uptime and cannot afford disruptions in connectivity. by acting as a dedicated wan aggregation point, the switch simplifies the deployment of redundant gateway configurations. it allows both primary and backup gateways to maintain simultaneous connectivity to the isp, ensuring immediate transition in the event of a failure. this design minimizes downtime and enhances overall network resilience without adding unnecessary complexity. the device integrates three 10g sfp+ ports, providing high speed uplink capability for modern gateway connections. these interfaces support both 10g and 1g operation, offering flexibility for different deployment scenarios. in addition, a dedicated 1 gbe rj45 port is included for management connectivity, allowing administrators to monitor and configure the device efficiently. with its focused functionality and streamlined design, the unifi wan switch is a key component for building robust wan infrastructures. it is especially suited for enterprise environments, service providers, and mission critical networks where redundancy and stability are essential requirements. the unifi wan switch is engineered to deliver efficient data handling and consistent performance under demanding network conditions. with a switching capacity of 20 gbps and a total non blocking throughput of 10 gbps, it ensures smooth data transmission between connected gateways and external networks. this performance level supports high bandwidth applications and maintains stability even during peak traffic periods. its forwarding rate of 15 million packets per second enables fast and accurate packet processing, reducing latency and improving responsiveness across the network. this is particularly important in high availability environments where rapid data exchange is critical for maintaining synchronization between active and standby systems. the switch is also designed with energy efficiency in mind, consuming a maximum of just 13 watts. this low power consumption makes it suitable for continuous operation without significantly increasing operational costs. combined with dual internal power supplies, the device provides an additional layer of reliability by ensuring consistent operation even if one power source is interrupted. overall, the unifi wan switch offers a balanced combination of performance and efficiency, making it a dependable solution for maintaining stable wan connectivity in professional network environments. the unifi wan switch features a robust rack-mountable 1u form factor that integrates easily into standard network cabinets. its enclosure is constructed from sgcc steel, providing strength and protection for long-term operation in professional environments. the device is equipped with dual ac power inputs supporting a wide voltage range of 100 to 240 volts, ensuring compatibility with various power infrastructures. this redundant power design enhances operational reliability and supports continuous uptime in critical applications. internal power supplies rated at 36 watts further contribute to stable and efficient performance. the switch operates within a temperature range of minus 5 to 40° c and supports humidity levels from 10 to 90 % without condensation. enhanced electrostatic discharge protection helps safeguard the device against electrical disturbances, increasing overall resilience in diverse environments. for monitoring and management, the device includes led indicators for ethernet, sfp+, and system status, providing quick visual feedback. it is managed through the unifi network platform, ensuring seamless integration into existing unifi ecosystems. with its compact size, solid construction, and reliable performance, the unifi wan switch is a practical and dependable component for modern network infrastructures. ubiquiti switches utility alfa ethernet devices mikrotik unifi delivers exceptional ethernet support, enabling data transmission speeds of up to 1 gbps. the conductor wire gauge of 24 awg, coupled with solid bare copper conductors, ensures minimal signal attenuation and reliable connectivity over extended distances. the cable's construction incorporates solid polyethylene insulation with precise thickness specifications, providing excellent electrical insulation and protection against environmental factors. polyester wrapping and an anti-crosstalk divider contribute to enhanced signal integrity, minimizing interference and crosstalk in high-density and iso/iec 11801 (edition 2.2), ensuring compatibility and interoperability with existing network infrastructure. additionally, the cable's wide operating temperature range, from -40 to 80°c (-40 to records.name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Flex Utility
records.short_description: USW-Flex-Utility outdoor weatherproof enclosure for use with UniFi Switch Flex
records.searchText: ubiquiti unifi switch flex utility ubiquiti usw-flex-utility usw-flex-utility boxes & cases boxes & cases utility usw-flex-utility outdoor weatherproof enclosure for use with unifi switch flex the ubiquiti unifi switch flex utility (usw-flex-utility) is a purpose-built outdoor weatherproof enclosure designed specifically for use with the unifi switch flex. it provides a secure, durable, and professional solution for deploying the switch in exposed or semi-industrial environments where protection from weather, dust, and mechanical impact is essential. engineered for long-term outdoor use, the enclosure allows the switch flex to be installed in locations such as building exteriors, poles, warehouses, parking structures, and industrial sites. the enclosure and included components are optimized for practical installation. the enclosure weight of 740 g provides mechanical stability without excessive load on mounting surfaces, while the included power adapter weighs 206 g, keeping the overall installation compact and manageable. this balance makes the usw-flex-utility ideal for wall or pole mounting scenarios where space and weight constraints matter. by housing both the switch and power components in a single protected unit, the flex utility enclosure simplifies cable management and reduces the need for additional external protection. it enables cleaner installations, minimizes exposure to moisture and contaminants, and extends the operational lifespan of the network hardware. designed to meet enterprise and government deployment requirements, the usw-flex-utility is ndaa compliant and certified to ce, fcc, and ic standards, ensuring regulatory compliance across multiple regions. for network installers and system integrators, it provides a reliable and standardized solution for outdoor unifi switch flex deployments. note: unifi switch flex sold separately ubiquiti boxes & cases utility unifi switching

records.searchText: ubiquiti unifi switch enterprise 8 poe ubiquiti usw-enterprise-8-poe usw-enterprise-8-poe switches switches enterprise usw enterprise 8 poe, 8 rj45 2.5gbe ports, 2 sfp+ 10g ports, 1.3'' touchscreen the unifi switch enterprise 8 poe is a compact layer 3 switch designed for environments that require reliable multi-gigabit connectivity combined with integrated power delivery. it features eight 2.5 gbe rj45 ports, all supporting poe+, allowing the switch to deliver both data and power to connected devices such as access points, ip phones, and cameras over a single ethernet cable. this simplifies deployment, reduces cabling complexity, and helps keep installations clean and efficient. in addition to copper ports, the switch includes two high-speed 10g sfp+ uplinks that enable fast connections to aggregation switches, servers, or network storage. this makes it well suited for scenarios where high-bandwidth backhaul is required, such as offices with multiple access points or creative environments handling large data transfers. the device is optimized for poe+ output and provides a generous total poe power budget, enabling multiple powered devices to operate simultaneously. it is important to note that while the switch supports poe+, it is not designed for poe++ use cases and therefore is not compatible with newer access points that require higher power levels. overall, this switch offers a balanced combination of performance, flexibility, and simplicity for growing networks. ubiquiti switches enterprise alfa ethernet devices mikrotik unifi access points unifi switching

records.name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Standard 48 PoE
records.short_description: The Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Pro 48 (USW-Pro-48) is a powerful enterprise-class PoE switch designed for modern business networks that require both high port density and integrated power delivery.
records.searchText: ubiquiti unifi switch standard 48 poe ubiquiti usw-48-poe usw-48-poe switches switches unifi switching standard the ubiquiti unifi switch pro 48 (usw-pro-48) is a powerful enterprise-class poe switch designed for modern business networks that require both high port density and integrated power delivery. the ubiquiti unifi switch pro 48 (usw-pro-48) is a powerful enterprise-class poe switch designed for modern business networks that require both high port density and integrated power delivery. built in a rack-mountable 1u form factor, the switch fits seamlessly into standard network racks with supported depths from 400 to 1200 mm, while its compact 442 × 285 × 44 mm dimensions help conserve valuable rack space. ubiquiti switches unifi switching standard alfa ethernet devices mikrotik

records.name: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch Lite 16 PoE
records.short_description: USW-Lite-16-POE Switch, 16 x Gigabit Ethernet ports, including 8 x 802.3af/at PoE+ ports
records.searchText: ubiquiti unifi switch lite 16 poe ubiquiti usw-lite-16-poe usw-lite-16-poe switches switches utility usw-lite-16-poe switch, 16 x gigabit ethernet ports, including 8 x 802.3af/at poe+ ports the ubiquiti unifi switch 16 poe is a compact, layer 2 managed ethernet switch designed for small offices, retail spaces, classrooms, and home business networks that require power over ethernet in a quiet, space-efficient form factor. it features 16 gigabit ethernet rj45 ports, 8 of which support poe+, allowing direct power delivery to access points, ip cameras, voip phones, and other poe-enabled devices without additional power injectors. with a total poe power budget of 45w and up to 32w per poe+ port, the switch can reliably support multiple powered devices simultaneously. the fanless cooling design ensures completely silent operation, making the switch ideal for noise-sensitive environments such as offices, meeting rooms, or residential installations. heat is dissipated passively, with low thermal output of 51.2 btu/hr (excluding poe). the switch supports desktop placement or wall mounting, offering installation flexibility in constrained spaces. its polycarbonate enclosure balances durability and portability, with a total device weight of approximately 1.2 kg for reliable continuous operation. power is provided by an internal 60w ac/dc power supply with a universal input voltage range of 100–240v ac at 50/60 hz, ensuring reliable and consistent operation of the switch in different electrical environments. this makes the unifi switch 16 poe an excellent choice for edge deployments where efficiency, silence, and poe capability are essential. despite its compact size, the unifi switch 16 poe delivers strong layer 2 performance suitable for modern gigabit networks. it provides a switching capacity of 32 gbps, combined with a total non-blocking throughput of 16 gbps, ensuring that all ports can operate at full speed simultaneously without congestion. with a forwarding rate of up to 24 million packets per second, the switch efficiently handles high packet loads from real-time applications such as voice, video, and surveillance traffic. a mac address table supporting up to 8,000 entries allows stable operation in networks with a large number of connected devices, while the 0.5 mb packet buffer helps smooth traffic bursts and reduce packet loss under load. the switch supports up to 1,000 vlans, enabling logical network segmentation for improved security, traffic isolation, and performance optimization. this makes it suitable for environments where corporate, guest, and iot traffic must be separated on the same physical infrastructure. advanced layer 2 capabilities include jumbo frame support, which improves efficiency for data-intensive workloads, as well as port mirroring for traffic analysis and troubleshooting. lacp link aggregation allows multiple ports to be combined into a single logical link, increasing bandwidth and providing link redundancy where required. together, these performance characteristics ensure that the unifi switch 16 poe can reliably serve as an access-layer switch for demanding small-scale deployments. the unifi switch 16 poe is managed through the unifi network application (version 7.2.94 or later), providing centralized configuration, monitoring, and control via ethernet. the intuitive unifi interface allows administrators to deploy and manage the switch alongside other unifi devices from a single dashboard. security and traffic control are handled through a rich set of layer 2 features. these include 802.1x authentication, mac-based access control lists, mac address blocking, and port-based isolation, which help prevent unauthorized access and lateral movement within the network. dhcp snooping and guarding protect against rogue dhcp servers, while ip-based acls enable granular traffic filtering. for voice and multimedia traffic, the switch supports voice vlan and lldp-med, ensuring proper device identification and traffic prioritization. advanced igmp functionality, including igmp snooping, querier, fast leave, and router port, ensures efficient delivery of multicast traffic used in iptv, video distribution, and ip-based audio-video systems. traffic stability is maintained through loop protection, broadcast and multicast rate limiting, traffic storm control, flow control, and outgoing traffic rate limits, preventing network disruptions caused by misconfigurations or faulty devices. the virtual network override feature allows per-port virtual network assignment, even when default network policies differ. with ndaa compliance and certifications including ce, fcc, ic, and anatel, the unifi switch 16 poe meets international regulatory and security requirements, making it suitable for professional deployments worldwide. ubiquiti switches utility alfa ethernet devices mikrotik unifi switching
